author: tdmarchetta
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Chat with your notes in a right sidebar using a remote Ollama server.

manifest.author: Taylor Marchetta
manifest.description: Chat with your notes in a right sidebar using a remote Ollama server.
manifest.name: Ollama Notes Chat

name: Ollama Notes Chat

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
Maintenance release — no behavior change.

- Replaced the two CSS `:has()` selectors in the settings pane with an `ollama-chat-setting-wide` class applied via `Setting.setClass()`. `:has()` triggers broad style invalidation; a plain class on the setting container is equivalent and cheaper.
- `OllamaClient.ts`: qualified the streaming `/api/chat` call as `window.fetch` and dropped the now-redundant `no-restricted-globals` eslint-disable. Still `fetch`, not `requestUrl` — ADR-002 holds.
- README title aligned to the plugin name.

`minAppVersion` unchanged at 1.7.2. Lint clean, build green, 85 tests pass.
releases.name: 0.7.5 — CSS :has removal + lint cleanup

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
Clears the two remaining warnings from the bot's 0.7.3 rescan:

- `requestAnimationFrame()` → `window.requestAnimationFrame()` (`ChatView`)
- `activeWindow.setTimeout()` → `window.setTimeout()` (`StatsModal`) — the Obsidian rule wants `window.` for timer functions specifically, not `activeWindow.`. 0.7.3 over-corrected based on the earlier scan.

After this push the only remaining bot flag is the streaming `fetch` in `OllamaClient.ts` — the one intentional `/skip` covered by ADR-002.
releases.name: 0.7.4 — Timer function popout compatibility

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
## Highlights

A maintenance release that addresses every issue the Obsidian review bot flagged on 0.7.2 except the one intentional `/skip` (the streaming `fetch` in `OllamaClient`, documented in ADR-002 and required for live-token UX).

## Errors fixed

- **Bump `minAppVersion` 1.4.0 → 1.7.2.** The plugin uses `Workspace.revealLeaf` (added in 1.7.2) and `setTooltip` (added in 1.4.4). Declare it honestly.
- **Add `-- reason` descriptions to all `eslint-disable` directives.**

## Warnings fixed (popout-window compatibility)

These break when the chat view is popped into a separate Obsidian window:

- `document` → `activeDocument` / `createEl` helpers (`DiffView`, `SettingsTab`, `ChatView`, `HistoryDrawer`)
- `setTimeout` → `activeWindow.setTimeout` (`StatsModal`)
- Drop `globalThis` cast for `crypto.randomUUID`; access the global directly (`Conversation`, `OllamaClient`)

## Build hygiene

- Replace the `builtin-modules` dev dep with `node:module`'s `builtinModules`. One fewer dependency in `package.json`.

## Stats

- 13 files touched, net -31 lines
- All 85 tests still pass
- Lint clean, build green
releases.name: 0.7.3 — Lint cleanup + popout window compatibility

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
## Highlights

**Text-to-speech** — new speaker button on every assistant response. Click to read the response aloud using your system voice; click again (or pick another) to stop. The icon accents while speaking.

Powered by the browser-native Web Speech API (`window.speechSynthesis`) — no network calls, no API keys, no new runtime dependencies. Markdown is stripped before speaking: code blocks are silenced, links/wikilinks are reduced to their display text, formatting markers are dropped.

New **Settings → Text-to-speech** section with an Enable toggle (default on). Disabling hides the speaker button without re-rendering.

## On macOS — getting Siri-quality voices

The plugin uses whatever's installed under *System Settings → Accessibility → Spoken Content → System Voice*. To get a Siri-quality voice, click the **ⓘ** next to System Voice and download a Premium voice (e.g., Ava, Zoe, Evan, Nathan). Restart Obsidian after install.

## Compatibility

- Requires `speechSynthesis` to be available in the runtime (all desktop Obsidian builds support it).
- If the platform doesn't expose it, the speaker button silently doesn't appear.
releases.name: 0.7.2 — Text-to-speech for assistant responses

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
## Highlights

**Export conversations** — new modal (header share icon + "Export conversations" command) with three scopes (this conversation, all conversations, date range) and two formats:

- **Markdown** — one `.md` per conversation, same format as Save-as-note
- **JSON** — single `ollama-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json` containing the snapshot array (round-trippable)

New **Settings → Export** section adds a default folder and default format.

Full plugin user guide is now bundled at [`docs/user-guide.md`](docs/user-guide.md) covering all 15 areas of the plugin.

## Also bundled (previously untagged)

- **Stability audit (V1–V8)** — eight verified bug fixes across rewrite (CRLF normalization, fence stripping), tools (dotfile filtering, deep arg sanitization, byte→char rename), save-as-note (CR/LF in YAML title), and RAG (crash-recoverable VectorStore.save).
- **Vitest scaffold** — 72 tests across pure-logic modules.
- **Pre-GitHub security hardening** (0.5.2).
- **Tool use / function calling** (0.5.0) via the native Ollama tools protocol — `read_note` and `list_folder`, opt-in, read-only.
- **Text selection allowed in chat message bodies** (0.5.1).

## Install

Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, and \`styles.css\` into \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ollama-notes-chat/\`, then enable the plugin under **Settings → Community plugins**.

Requires Obsidian 1.4.0+. Desktop only.
releases.name: 0.7.1 — Export conversations

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
## RAG retrieval

- New `retrieval` context mode. Embeds user message via `/api/embed`, runs cosine top-K over in-memory vector store, renders hits as `From [[Note#Heading]]:` citations (clickable internal links).
- `Indexer` walks the vault on `workspace.onLayoutReady()` — mtime-diff incremental. Debounces `modify`/`rename` at 2s, handles `delete` immediately. Embeds in batches of 20 with event-loop yields.
- Embedder model independent from chat model. Changing it invalidates the store and forces a full rebuild.
- Embeddings persist to `{manifest.dir}/index.json` (not `data.json`) with atomic `.tmp` → `rename` writes. Schema v1 stores `embedderModel` + `embeddingDim` so swaps trigger clean rebuilds instead of dimension mismatches.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ollama-notes-chat/`, then reload Obsidian.

Requires `OLLAMA_ORIGINS=*` (or `app://obsidian.md`) on the Ollama host for streaming.

releases.author: tdmarchetta
releases.description:
First release.

- Right-sidebar chat panel with streaming responses via Ollama's native `/api/chat`
- Context modes: current note, current selection, current note + one-hop linked notes, none
- Slash commands (`/summarize`, `/expand`, `/rewrite`, `/brainstorm`), editable in settings
- Per-note frontmatter overrides (`ai.model`, `ai.systemPrompt`)
- Save conversation as note, insert response at cursor, regenerate last response
- Response stats modal (tokens/sec, prompt/eval/load timing, TTFT)
- Native Obsidian theming via CSS variables — inherits any light/dark theme

Requires Ollama on your LAN with `OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434` and `OLLAMA_ORIGINS=*`. See README for setup.
